content: These criteria never improved across 2 iterations and scored <70% — may be unmeasurable or need clearer measurements: cross_validation_analytics_precision, statistical_sampling_methodology_rigor, internal_control_deficiency_causal_analysis
task: Write a forensic accounting memo analyzing suspected revenue manipulation at a mid-market SaaS company. Include journal entry analysis, Benfords Law testing, timeline reconstruction, and quantified financial impact.
